sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_power (base INT, exponent INT, result FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_power (base, exponent, result) VALUES (2, 3, power(2, 3));
UPDATE test_power SET result = power(base, exponent) WHERE base = 2 AND exponent = 3;
SELECT base, exponent, result FROM test_power WHERE result = power(base, exponent);
INSERT INTO test_power (base, exponent, result) VALUES (5, 2, power(5, 2));
